{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Dashen's Soulbinding
| introduced = Of Killers and Kings
}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Dashen's Soulbinding]] was unsuccessful.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c24">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
